_comment: NIL athlete dataset. Figures are estimated 12-month NIL valuations from public reporting (On3, FOX Sports, SportsGrid) and/or our model, not amounts paid. 'reported: true' cites a public figure (see source). Add athletes here and run `node scripts/build.js` to regenerate pages + sitemap. Keep data accurate and sourced, each page must offer real value to rank.

athletes.name: Arch Manning
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Texas quarterback and member of the Manning football dynasty holds the highest NIL valuation of any college athlete heading into 2026, driven by elite name recognition and a blue-chip program.

athletes.name: Jeremiah Smith
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: After a standout freshman season, the Ohio State receiver became the first college athlete on a Red Bull can and signed with Adidas, EA Sports, Nintendo and more, fueling a top-tier NIL valuation.

athletes.name: Carson Beck
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The veteran quarterback transferred to Miami and carries one of the highest NIL valuations in college football, backed by national exposure in the ACC.

athletes.name: Sam Leavitt
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: After a breakout at Arizona State, the quarterback transferred to LSU and carries a top-five NIL valuation heading into the 2026 season.

athletes.name: LaNorris Sellers
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: South Carolina's dynamic dual-threat quarterback is among the SEC's most valuable NIL assets heading into 2026.

athletes.name: Garrett Nussmeier
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: LSU's quarterback ranks among the top NIL earners in college football, boosted by the Tigers' national brand.

athletes.name: Cade Klubnik
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Clemson's starting quarterback carries a multi-million-dollar NIL valuation as a face of the ACC.

athletes.name: Drew Allar
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Penn State's quarterback is one of the Big Ten's highest-valued NIL athletes heading into 2026.

athletes.name: Dante Moore
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Oregon's quarterback holds a seven-figure NIL valuation as the Ducks compete at the top of the Big Ten.

athletes.name: Bryce Underwood
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The heralded Michigan freshman quarterback arrived with one of the largest NIL valuations of any incoming player in the country.

athletes.name: AJ Dybantsa
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The BYU freshman phenom is among the highest-valued basketball players in the country, with a valuation rivaling the top college football stars.

athletes.name: JT Toppin
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Texas Tech's standout forward returned to school on a major NIL package, making him one of college basketball's highest-valued players.

athletes.name: Cameron Boozer
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Duke freshman and son of NBA veteran Carlos Boozer is among the most valuable newcomers in college basketball.

athletes.name: Morez Johnson Jr.
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Michigan forward carries a seven-figure NIL valuation among the Wolverines' rising basketball core.

athletes.name: Jayden Quaintance
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Kentucky's young big man is one of the highest-valued sophomores in college basketball.

athletes.name: Caleb Wilson
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The North Carolina freshman forward ranks near the top of college basketball NIL valuations.

athletes.name: Braden Smith
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Purdue's senior floor general is one of the most valuable returning guards in college basketball.

athletes.name: Denzel Aberdeen
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Kentucky guard carries a seven-figure NIL valuation after transferring into a national-title contender.

athletes.name: Flau'jae Johnson
athletes.source: On3 Women's NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The LSU guard and recording artist is the highest-valued player in women's college basketball, with a huge social following and 20-plus brand deals.

athletes.name: JuJu Watkins
athletes.source: On3 Women's NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: USC's superstar guard is among the most marketable players in women's college basketball, with national endorsement appeal.

athletes.name: NiJaree Canady
athletes.source: On3 / public reporting (2026)
athletes.blurb: Texas Tech's ace became the first softball player to cross the $1M NIL threshold after leading the Red Raiders to a Women's College World Series appearance.

athletes.name: Kai Trump
athletes.source: SportsGrid Women's NIL Rankings (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Miami golf commit carries one of the largest NIL valuations in women's sports, powered by an enormous social following and national name recognition.

athletes.name: Jade Carey
athletes.source: On3 Women's NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Olympic gold medalist and Oregon State gymnast is one of the highest-valued NIL athletes in college gymnastics.

athletes.name: Cam Coleman
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The explosive wide receiver is among the most valuable non-quarterbacks in college football, adding to Texas's loaded roster.

athletes.name: Yaxel Lendeborg
athletes.source: On3 / SportsGrid (2026)
athletes.blurb: After transferring from UAB to Michigan, the versatile forward saw his NIL value jump to among the highest in the Big Ten.

athletes.name: Darryn Peterson
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Kansas freshman guard and projected top NBA Draft pick carries star power and a seven-figure NIL valuation.

athletes.name: Jada Williams
athletes.source: On3 Women's NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: An early NIL pioneer who transferred to LSU, the veteran guard pairs leadership with a 1.1M-plus social following to rank among women's basketball's most valuable players.

athletes.name: Azzi Fudd
athletes.source: On3 Women's NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The UConn sharpshooter and national champion is one of the most recognizable names in women's college basketball.

athletes.name: Deja Kelly
athletes.source: On3 Women's NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The veteran guard is a proven NIL performer and one of the higher-valued players in women's college basketball.

athletes.name: Chloe Kitts
athletes.source: On3 Women's NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The South Carolina forward and national champion is a key NIL name for the powerhouse Gamecocks.

athletes.name: Caden Sorrell
athletes.source: SportsGrid / D1Baseball (2026)
athletes.blurb: A projected top-15 MLB Draft pick and the face of the Aggies, Sorrell holds one of the highest NIL valuations in college baseball.

athletes.name: Gavin Guidry
athletes.source: Estimate (D1Baseball top rankings, 2026)
athletes.blurb: The LSU pitcher is among the top NIL names in college baseball as a key arm for the national-contender Tigers.

athletes.name: DJ Lagway
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Florida quarterback owns one of the highest NIL valuations in college football as the face of the Gators' offense.

athletes.name: Julian Sayin
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: After a 32-touchdown redshirt-freshman season, the Ohio State quarterback is among the most valuable NIL players in the country.

athletes.name: Caleb Downs
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: One of the most valuable defensive players in college football, the Ohio State safety pairs elite play with deals from Beats and Panini.

athletes.name: Dylan Raiola
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Nebraska quarterback is the centerpiece of the Cornhuskers' rebuild and one of the highest-valued QBs in the sport.

athletes.name: Nico Iamaleava
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: After a high-profile transfer to UCLA, the quarterback remains one of the most talked-about NIL names in college football.

athletes.name: Ryan Williams
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The electric Alabama wide receiver and former five-star recruit carries brand deals with Uber Eats and Hollister.

athletes.name: Hannah Hidalgo
athletes.source: Estimate (widely reported, ~$1M; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The Notre Dame guard is one of the biggest stars in women's college basketball, with deals from Red Bull, New Era and Topps and CAA representation.

athletes.name: Tahaad Pettiford
athletes.source: Estimate (reported ~$2.1M NIL deal; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The Auburn point guard returned for his junior season on a reported seven-figure NIL package, turning down larger offers elsewhere.

athletes.name: John Mateer
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: After choosing to return to Oklahoma rather than enter the NFL Draft, Mateer is the highest-valued player in Sooners history, anchored by a Beats by Dre deal.

athletes.name: PJ Haggerty
athletes.source: Reports / On3 (2026)
athletes.blurb: One of the most coveted players in the transfer portal, the high-scoring guard landed at Kansas State on a reported $2.5M NIL deal.

athletes.name: Bennett Stirtz
athletes.source: Estimate (reported ~$1.7M; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The All-Transfer Team point guard followed coach Ben McCollum from Drake to Iowa and quickly became one of the Big Ten's most valuable players.

athletes.name: Colin Simmons
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Texas's star pass rusher returned for 2026 rather than declaring early, carrying one of the highest NIL valuations of any non-quarterback in college football.

athletes.name: Ryan Wingo
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Longhorns' big-play receiver pairs national SEC exposure with a seven-figure NIL valuation entering 2026.

athletes.name: CJ Carr
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Notre Dame's starting quarterback and a preseason Heisman contender, Carr enters 2026 among the most valuable players in college football.

athletes.name: Gunner Stockton
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Georgia's starting quarterback tops the Bulldogs' NIL board after stepping into the SEC spotlight in Athens.

athletes.name: KJ Bolden
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: A preseason All-American safety, Bolden is among Georgia's most marketable returning defenders.

athletes.name: Nate Frazier
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The Bulldogs' lead running back has built a strong NIL profile as a featured back in the SEC.

athletes.name: Ellis Robinson IV
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: A former five-star cornerback, Robinson is one of Georgia's rising NIL names on defense.

athletes.name: Elijah Griffin
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The top-rated defensive lineman in his recruiting class, Griffin already carries a six-figure NIL valuation at Georgia.

athletes.name: Boogie Fland
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Florida's lead guard runs it back for 2026-27 on a seven-figure NIL package after transferring from Arkansas.

athletes.name: Thomas Haugh
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The versatile forward passed on the NBA Draft to return to Florida, where his NIL profile ranks among college basketball's highest.

athletes.name: Karter Knox
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The athletic wing transferred to Louisville for 2026-27, bringing a six-figure NIL valuation and a growing national following.

athletes.name: Sarah Strong
athletes.source: Estimate (reported ~$1M+, Jordan Brand and other deals; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The reigning national champion and AP Player of the Year, Strong is the most valuable returning player in women's college basketball, with a Jordan Brand deal among her partnerships.

athletes.name: Madison Booker
athletes.source: Estimate (multiple major deals; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: A multi-year All-American, Booker became the first athlete in Kevin Durant's Nike-backed Texas NIL program.

athletes.name: Mikaylah Williams
athletes.source: Estimate (Jordan Brand and other deals; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: A First-Team All-SEC guard and Jordan Brand athlete, Williams is among the most marketable players in women's college basketball.

athletes.name: Keelon Russell
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: The former five-star quarterback is in the mix to start at Alabama and already carries a seven-figure NIL valuation entering 2026.

athletes.name: Dylan Stewart
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: South Carolina's star pass rusher returned for 2026 with one of the highest NIL valuations of any defender in college football.

athletes.name: Faizon Brandon
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Tennessee's prized five-star freshman quarterback arrived in Knoxville with one of the largest first-year NIL packages in the country.

athletes.name: Cayden Boozer
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Duke's starting point guard and a McDonald's All-American, Boozer pairs a large social following with a strong NIL valuation alongside twin brother Cameron.

athletes.name: Otega Oweh
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Kentucky's leading scorer withdrew from the NBA Draft to return for 2026-27 as one of the SEC's most valuable guards.

athletes.name: Alex Condon
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: Florida's versatile big man passed on the NBA Draft to return, projecting as a 2027 first-round pick and one of college basketball's most valuable forwards.

athletes.name: Joyce Edwards
athletes.source: Estimate (media reports ~$626K; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: A rising South Carolina star and McDonald's All-American, Edwards is one of the most marketable young players in women's college basketball.

athletes.name: Audi Crooks
athletes.source: Estimate (reported ~$1.4M transfer NIL deal; On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: The dominant post transferred to Oklahoma State on a reported seven-figure NIL package and brings a large national following.

athletes.name: Marcel Reed
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Marcel Reed returns to Texas A&M for 2026 after passing for 3,169 yards and 25 touchdowns and leading the Aggies to their first College Football Playoff appearance.

athletes.name: Jackson Arnold
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Jackson Arnold is a former top recruit and ex-Oklahoma and Auburn starter who transferred to UNLV for 2026, his third school in three seasons.

athletes.name: Devon Dampier
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Devon Dampier returns to Utah for 2026 after a debut season worth 2,490 passing yards and 835 rushing yards that earned Big 12 Offensive Newcomer of the Year.

athletes.name: Austin Simmons
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: Austin Simmons transferred from Ole Miss to Missouri and was named the Tigers' starting quarterback for the 2026 season.

athletes.name: Braylon Mullins
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Braylon Mullins is a sharpshooting UConn guard who hit a buzzer-beating game-winner against Duke in the 2026 NCAA Tournament and returns for his sophomore season after averaging 12.0 points.

athletes.name: Jasper Johnson
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 lists a recruiting-era figure; modeled for current role)
athletes.blurb: Jasper Johnson is a former five-star combo guard who transferred to Oregon after his freshman season at Kentucky, joining Dana Altman's 2026-27 backcourt.

athletes.name: MiLaysia Fulwiley
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 ranks her among top women's players; exact figure not disclosed)
athletes.blurb: MiLaysia Fulwiley is an explosive, highly marketable scoring guard who transferred from South Carolina to Kim Mulkey's LSU, averaging 14.6 points in her first Tigers season.

athletes.name: Syla Swords
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: Syla Swords is a Canadian Olympian and 2026 First-Team All-Big Ten guard who returns to anchor a top-five Michigan team after averaging about 14.6 points per game.

athletes.name: Sienna Betts
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not disclose exact figure)
athletes.blurb: Sienna Betts is a 6-foot-4 former top-three national recruit and 2026 Big Ten All-Freshman pick poised to become UCLA's offensive centerpiece.

athletes.name: Donnie Freeman
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Donnie Freeman is a 6-foot-9 forward from Washington, D.C. who transferred to St. John's after averaging 15.3 points and 7.5 rebounds across two injury-shortened seasons at Syracuse.

athletes.name: Tounde Yessoufou
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Tounde Yessoufou is a 6-foot-5 wing from Benin who set a Baylor freshman scoring record with 17.8 points per game, then transferred to St. John's on a reported multimillion-dollar NIL deal.

athletes.name: Julian Lewis
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Julian 'JuJu' Lewis is a five-star quarterback who reclassified to enroll early at Colorado and is positioned as the Buffaloes' projected 2026 starter under Deion Sanders.

athletes.name: Keisean Henderson
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Keisean Henderson is the No. 1 ranked quarterback in the 2026 class who enrolled early at Houston and signed a Panini America trading card NIL deal.

athletes.name: Husan Longstreet
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Husan Longstreet is a former five-star quarterback who left USC after one season and transferred to LSU, where he will compete for playing time in 2026.

athletes.name: Eric Singleton Jr.
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Eric Singleton Jr. is a senior wide receiver who joined Florida for 2026 after a freshman All-American season at Georgia Tech and a team-leading 58 catches at Auburn in 2025.

athletes.name: Jaylen Mbakwe
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Jaylen Mbakwe is a former five-star athlete who transferred from Alabama to Georgia Tech for 2026, where he is expected to play primarily cornerback.

athletes.name: Jake Schaffner
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Schaffner is a Brooks Wallace Award finalist and North Dakota State transfer who leads North Carolina in hits, runs and stolen bases as the leadoff catalyst.

athletes.name: Ryan Lynch
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Lynch is a preseason College Pitcher of the Year watch-list arm with a 94 to 96 mph sinker who threw seven shutout innings in the regional opener.

athletes.name: Mason Edwards
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Edwards is the Big Ten Pitcher of the Year and a National Pitcher of the Year frontrunner who went 8-0 with a 1.49 ERA and 154 strikeouts in 2026.

athletes.name: Grant Govel
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Govel is a USC weekend starter who threw a seven-inning no-hitter against Pepperdine and started the Trojans' NCAA Tournament opener.

athletes.name: Chris Rembert
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Rembert is one of the top pure hitters in the 2026 class, a Freshman All-American rated the nation's best second baseman by D1Baseball.

athletes.name: Jake Marciano
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Marciano is an Auburn weekend starter who posted a 2.64 ERA with 100 strikeouts over 81.2 innings after transferring from Virginia Tech.

athletes.name: Cade Townsend
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Townsend is a Golden Spikes Award semifinalist with a 96 mph fastball and a five-pitch mix, a projected first-round 2026 pick.

athletes.name: Hunter Elliott
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Elliott is Ole Miss's Friday-night ace and last holdover from the 2022 national title team, a Perfect Game preseason All-American.

athletes.name: Maxx Yehl
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Yehl is the Big 12 Pitcher of the Year and a National Pitcher of the Year finalist who went 8-2 with a 2.12 ERA and 101 strikeouts.

athletes.name: Dawson Montesa
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Montesa is a Division II transfer with a fastball up to 98 mph who pitched West Virginia into the Super Regionals.

athletes.name: Dylan Volantis
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Volantis is the Texas ace left-hander and 2025 Baseball America Freshman of the Year who moved into the Friday-night rotation in 2026.

athletes.name: Carson Tinney
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Tinney is a power-hitting transfer catcher and 2026 Buster Posey Award finalist slashing about .321 with roughly 20 home runs for Texas.

athletes.name: Ryan Cooney
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Cooney is Oregon's top hitter and a 2026 draft prospect, batting around .338 with eight home runs as a junior.

athletes.name: Maddox Molony
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Molony is Oregon's defensively gifted shortstop and a 2026 draft prospect who contributed power from the middle of the order.

athletes.name: Cal Scolari
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Scolari is an Oregon right-hander who posted a 2.94 ERA with about 76 strikeouts over 49 innings in 2026.

athletes.name: Tre Phelps
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Phelps is Georgia's premier bat, an All-American having a career year with a slash line above .390 in 2026.

athletes.name: Joey Volchko
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Volchko is Georgia's hard-throwing ace transfer with a fastball up to 99 mph who helped the Bulldogs win the SEC regular-season title.

athletes.name: Kolby Branch
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Branch is Georgia's everyday senior shortstop and a Brooks Wallace Award semifinalist who started all 61 games.

athletes.name: Ace Reese
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Reese is Mississippi State's slugging third baseman and 2026 preseason All-American, the 2025 SEC Newcomer of the Year.

athletes.name: Noah Sullivan
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Sullivan is Mississippi State's two-way standout and preseason All-American who hit about .345 while also posting a sub-2.00 ERA.

athletes.name: Chris Hacopian
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Hacopian is a 2026 First Team All-SEC infielder and Golden Spikes watch-list bat who hit .375 with 14 home runs at Maryland before transferring to Texas A&M.

athletes.name: Justin Lebron
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Lebron is Alabama's top position-player draft prospect and a former Freshman All-American who has been a three-year starter at shortstop.

athletes.name: Zane Adams
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Adams is Alabama's staff ace, a draft-eligible left-hander who anchors the weekend rotation.

athletes.name: Jaxon Willits
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Willits is a switch-hitting shortstop and Oklahoma's top middle-infield draft prospect with a polished plate approach.

athletes.name: Cameron Johnson
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Johnson is an LSU transfer left-hander and former top-15 national recruit who has been a strikeout-heavy weekend starter for Oklahoma.

athletes.name: Tyson LeBlanc
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: LeBlanc is a junior college transfer shortstop who led Kansas in home runs and OPS and was named NCBWA National Hitter of the Month for May 2026.

athletes.name: Dominic Voegele
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Voegele is Kansas's Friday-night ace who leads the staff in innings and strikeouts and threw a 15-strikeout complete game in 2026.

athletes.name: Adam Agresti
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Agresti is St. John's standout catcher and top draft prospect who posted 19 home runs and a 1.211 OPS in 2026.

athletes.name: Liam O'Leary
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: O'Leary is St. John's ace right-hander and a unanimous All-Big East First Team selection who went 8-4 with a 2.97 ERA in 2026.

athletes.name: Daniel Jackson
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Jackson is a 2026 Golden Spikes Award semifinalist who became the first SEC player ever with a 25 home run, 25 stolen base season.

athletes.name: Michael O'Shaughnessy
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: A Davidson transfer, O'Shaughnessy hit a three-run homer in the eighth inning to win Game 1 of the Athens Super Regional and has roughly 20 home runs in 2026.

athletes.name: Jason DeCaro
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: DeCaro is a 2026 Golden Spikes Award semifinalist who threw a two-hit complete-game shutout to force a super regional Game 3, going 10-2 with a sub-2.60 ERA.

athletes.name: Dean Carpentier
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Carpentier hit a game-winning grand slam in Game 1 of the Chapel Hill Super Regional against North Carolina.

athletes.name: Adrian Rodriguez
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Rodriguez is a former Freshman All-American infielder and a key 2026 draft prospect in the Texas lineup.

athletes.name: Austin Fawley
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Fawley hit 21 home runs in 2025, the most by an Ole Miss catcher in the Mike Bianco era, and returned as a draft-eligible bat.

athletes.name: Brendan Brock
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Brock, a former NJCAA First Team All-American, is Oklahoma's top-ranked 2026 draft prospect and an SEC Player of the Week.

athletes.name: Camden Johnson
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Johnson is a corner infielder and one of Oklahoma's top 2026 draft prospects, ranked inside the top 150.

athletes.name: Armani Guzman
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Guzman is a contact and on-base utility man who helped West Virginia clinch its first College World Series berth.

athletes.name: Jimmy Janicki
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Janicki is the 2026 Sun Belt Player of the Year who hit .349 with 19 home runs and 85 RBIs to lead Troy to its first College World Series.

athletes.name: Gavin Kelly
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Kelly is a Golden Spikes and Dick Howser semifinalist who hit about .379 with 16 home runs to power West Virginia to its first College World Series, and is rated the No. 1 prospect for the 2027 MLB Draft.

athletes.name: Judd Utermark
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Utermark is the Ole Miss career home run king with 49 and a 2026 MLB draft prospect known for elite raw power.

athletes.name: Aaron Piasecki
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Piasecki is a contact-hitting middle infielder and 2026 draft prospect who founded the Lumbertown Bat Company, a rare student-athlete NIL venture, and helped Troy reach its first College World Series.

athletes.name: Jabe Boroff
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly list baseball NIL figures)
athletes.blurb: Boroff is a two-way senior who became a postseason hero with two home runs, including a grand slam, in Troy's super regional clincher.

athletes.name: Teagan Kavan
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Kavan is the first player to win Women's College World Series Most Outstanding Player in back to back years, closing out Texas's repeat national title in 2026.

athletes.name: Katie Stewart
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Stewart was the 2026 SEC Player of the Year and set a Texas single-season home run record with 24 during a .441 campaign.

athletes.name: Kayden Henry
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Henry hit .409 with 72 runs in 2026 and homered in Game 2 of the Women's College World Series championship series.

athletes.name: Reese Atwood
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Atwood, regarded as the nation's top catcher, won back to back national titles at Texas before being drafted into the pro AUSL.

athletes.name: Mia Williams
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Williams led Texas Tech in average, home runs and RBIs in 2026 at .438 with 26 home runs, and is the daughter of former NBA guard Jason Williams.

athletes.name: Avery Johnson
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Avery Johnson is a dual-threat senior quarterback returning to Kansas State for 2026 after setting the school single-season passing touchdown record, and ranks among the Big 12's top NIL earners.

athletes.name: Beau Pribula
athletes.source: On3 NIL Valuations (2026)
athletes.blurb: Beau Pribula is a quarterback who transferred from Missouri to Virginia for 2026 and is projected to start after passing for 1,941 yards and 11 touchdowns in 2025.

athletes.name: Tomislav Ivisic
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Tomislav Ivisic is a 7-foot-1 Croatian stretch center who returns to Illinois for 2026-27 after a Final Four season.

athletes.name: Mikayla Blakes
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Mikayla Blakes led all of NCAA Division I in scoring at 27.0 points per game as a sophomore and returns as Vanderbilt's backcourt anchor.

athletes.name: Olivia Olson
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Olivia Olson is a 6-foot-1 guard who made the All-Big Ten First Team as a sophomore and headlines a top-ranked Michigan team for 2026-27.

athletes.name: Toby Fournier
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
athletes.blurb: Toby Fournier is a 6-foot-2 forward from Toronto who averaged 17.3 points as a sophomore and earned All-ACC First Team and All-ACC Defensive Team honors at Duke.

athletes.name: Kennedy Smith
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not publicly disclose a figure)
